title: Illager Trader
description: This Mod adds a new villager, the Illager trader
body:
**This Mod adds a new villager, the friendly Illager trader, with custom trades.**

You can get the new villager by finding the new structure or by placing a target block as his workstation.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73a409496d50d938adce768b30110e6cfc93ced2.png)

**The major features include:**

- A new structure with the Illager trader inside
- New custom trades, with new items
- The new illager profession
 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
